cit.basis: Estonian model (since 2017): 15% CIT on DISTRIBUTED profit only; retained/reinvested profit is taxed at 0%.
cit.gross_up_note: For some distributions Georgia grosses up the base (net / 0.85, i.e. 15% of the 100/85 gross-up). This estimator applies 15% directly to the distribution for simplicity.
cit.note: Administered by the Revenue Service (rs.ge). Financial institutions and certain sectors may follow different regimes.

personal_income_tax.note: Flat 20% personal income tax on employment income (approximate).

metadata.note: Rates in this pack are AI-estimated and MUST be verified against the Revenue Service (rs.ge) before any production tax filing.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Estonian-model deemed distributions, gross-up, sector regimes, deductions, WHT, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
